title: Game Obscure Evangelion Game Boy and SNES Slideshows
display_title: Game Obscure Evangelion Game Boy and SNES Slideshows
wikitext:
[]: [Game] Obscure Evangelion Game Boy and SNES Slideshows             Quote Post by xPearse » Sun Aug 30, 2015 4:37 pm I discovered these sometime last year on the Russian Eva community and became rather puzzled. I'm unsure who made them or where they came from because there wasn't exactly any info on them other than they exist. Odd. However, there are four of them and they go like this: Rei Slideshow: Some pics and text, no porn Asuka: Some porn, but not all of it is Disk-00: Pics from the show slapped on a cart Slideshow E: Porn with some nasty looking crotch hair Now, for curiosity's sake I'll drop some pics below, but if you want to see them for yourself or just some more pics, then I'd recommend you head to my blog. The link is below. Also, thoughts? Anyone heard of these before or want to chime in? http://pearsehillock.blogspot.co.uk/2015/08/neon-genesis-evangelion-misc-gb-and.html Rei Slideshow SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Aug 30, 2015 5:34 pm At first I thought this was a discussion about the Kaji Angels Raising game. Pretty sure those are similar to bootleg NES/etc games that are unofficial but with porn.

[]:             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Sun Aug 30, 2015 5:37 pm I remember this from when I was younger, I had it on an SNES emulator.

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Fri Sep 04, 2015 12:48 pm There were digital sources available at the time such as the Collector's Disks for the official artwork. Maybe they went old school to fly under the radar.
